'''ngomachaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:bygone|bygone]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-m-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:bygone|bygone]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ngomachaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngomachithi|ngomachithi]] || [[word:ngomachiji|ngomachiji]] || [[word:ngomachishi|ngomachishi]] || [[word:ngomachiki|ngomachiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngomachuthuthu|ngomachuthuthu]] || [[word:ngomachujuju|ngomachujuju]] || [[word:ngomachushushu|ngomachushushu]] || [[word:ngomachukuku|ngomachukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngomachuthu|ngomachuthu]] || [[word:ngomachuju|ngomachuju]] || [[word:ngomachushu|ngomachushu]] || [[word:ngomachuku|ngomachuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngomachufthuf|ngomachufthuf]] || [[word:ngomachufjuf|ngomachufjuf]] || [[word:ngomachufshuf|ngomachufshuf]] || [[word:ngomachufkuf|ngomachufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngomachethe|ngomachethe]] || [[word:ngomacheje|ngomacheje]] || [[word:ngomacheshe|ngomacheshe]] || [[word:ngomacheke|ngomacheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngomachothotho|ngomachothotho]] || [[word:ngomachojojo|ngomachojojo]] || [[word:ngomachoshosho|ngomachoshosho]] || [[word:ngomachokoko|ngomachokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngomachotho|ngomachotho]] || [[word:ngomachojo|ngomachojo]] || [[word:ngomachosho|ngomachosho]] || [[word:ngomachoko|ngomachoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngomachofthof|ngomachofthof]] || [[word:ngomachofjof|ngomachofjof]] || [[word:ngomachofshof|ngomachofshof]] || [[word:ngomachofkof|ngomachofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngomachĂŻfthĂŻf|ngomachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngomachĂŻfjĂŻf|ngomachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngomachĂŻfshĂŻf|ngomachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngomachĂŻfkĂŻf|ngomachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngomachĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|ngomachĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngomachĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|ngomachĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngomachĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|ngomachĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngomachĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|ngomachĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngomachĂŻfthĂŻf|ngomachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngomachĂŻfjĂŻf|ngomachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngomachĂŻfshĂŻf|ngomachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngomachĂŻfkĂŻf|ngomachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngomachĂŻfthĂŻf|ngomachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngomachĂŻfjĂŻf|ngomachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngomachĂŻfshĂŻf|ngomachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngomachĂŻfkĂŻf|ngomachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngomachĂŠthĂŠ|ngomachĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:ngomachĂŠjĂŠ|ngomachĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:ngomachĂŠshĂŠ|ngomachĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:ngomachĂŠkĂŠ|ngomachĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngomachathatha|ngomachathatha]] || [[word:ngomachajaja|ngomachajaja]] || [[word:ngomachashasha|ngomachashasha]] || [[word:ngomachakaka|ngomachakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngomachatha|ngomachatha]] || [[word:ngomachaja|ngomachaja]] || [[word:ngomachasha|ngomachasha]] || [[word:ngomachaka|ngomachaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngomachafthaf|ngomachafthaf]] || [[word:ngomachafjaf|ngomachafjaf]] || [[word:ngomachafshaf|ngomachafshaf]] || [[word:ngomachafkaf|ngomachafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:ngomachasha|ngomachasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngomachshĂ«sha|ngomachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngomachrosha|ngomachrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngomachmusha|ngomachmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngomachyasha|ngomachyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongomachnkshĂ«sha|gongomachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongomachnkrosha|gongomachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongomachnkmusha|gongomachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongomachnkyasha|gongomachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:ngomamachasha|ngomamachasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngomamachshĂ«sha|ngomamachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngomamachrosha|ngomamachrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngomamachmusha|ngomamachmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngomamachyasha|ngomamachyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongomamachnkshĂ«sha|gongomamachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongomamachnkrosha|gongomamachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongomamachnkmusha|gongomamachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongomamachnkyasha|gongomamachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:ngemĂŠchasha|ngemĂŠchasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngemĂŠchshĂ«sha|ngemĂŠchshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngemĂŠchrosha|ngemĂŠchrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngemĂŠchmusha|ngemĂŠchmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngemĂŠchyasha|ngemĂŠchyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongemĂŠchnkshĂ«sha|gongemĂŠchnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongemĂŠchnkrosha|gongemĂŠchnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongemĂŠchnkmusha|gongemĂŠchnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongemĂŠchnkyasha|gongemĂŠchnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:ngomfachasha|ngomfachasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngomfachshĂ«sha|ngomfachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngomfachrosha|ngomfachrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngomfachmusha|ngomfachmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngomfachyasha|ngomfachyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongomfachnkshĂ«sha|gongomfachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongomfachnkrosha|gongomfachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongomfachnkmusha|gongomfachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongomfachnkyasha|gongomfachnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
